---
title: 'Character Sketch: Template'
date: '2050-10-26T06:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'SCHEDULED'
blogger_post_id: '898633435175086269'
blogger_filename: '/2050/10/character-sketch-template.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Character Sketch'
  - 'White Noise'
---

*Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/">Hints</a>)(<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Now,_Discover_Your_Strengths">Strengths List</a>)(<a href="https://www.isa.org/templates/two-column.aspx?pageid=134103&amp;append=35734">Strengths details</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types">16P-Types</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory">16P-Theory</a>)<br />
<h4>
Who are you?</h4>
<strong>Name:</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>Age:</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>Description:</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>One or two physical things that tell us something about your personality or past:</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>Your Stronghold Cycle:</strong><br />
<em>â€œWe donâ€™t see things as they are, we see them as we are.â€&nbsp;</em> ~The Talmud<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/anatomy-of-a-stronghold-a1e2a85703bf.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="228" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/anatomy-of-a-stronghold-4076b1ad2f1b.png" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<strong>What happened (event) to cause you the biggest pain?</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>What lie (fear) did you believe, as a result of this pain? What fear keeps you from your "it"?</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>What defense/comfort did you seek as a result of this lie?</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>What reaction came as a result of the defense/comfort you ran to, that caused another event?</strong><br />
<br />
<br />
<strong>What do you really want (emotionally), that fear keeps you from attaining?</strong><br />
(Ex: Success, Connection, Love, Stability, Acceptance, Recognition, Freedom,...)<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
